content.stem: What number is missing in this pattern? 3, 7, 11, ___, 19, 23
content.explanation: This pattern adds 4 to each number. Starting with 3: 3+4=7, 7+4=11, 11+4=15, 15+4=19, 19+4=23.

metadata.cognitive_skill: Arithmetic sequence pattern recognition with missing middle element

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student uses +3 rule instead of +4, or adds 10 to first number
Student takes average of surrounding numbers (11+19)/2=15 but miscalculates
Student estimates based on position without finding the rule
